productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Men Navy Blue & Grey Pyjama Set
description: Style NotePerfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear for a morning jog or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from Sweet Dreams Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in suave and sporty styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsNavy blue T-shirt, with round neck with grey collar, short sleeves, graphic print on the left chest, contrast panel across the shoulder and sleevesGrey bermuda shorts, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sides and contrast panel on the sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shade   Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing size M
